entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE AND FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems designed to be environmentally sound and socially responsible while ensuring food security

entities.name: CSR INVESTMENTS
entities.description: Corporate Social Responsibility funding directed towards development goals in the agriculture sector

entities.name: HUNGER
entities.description: A state of deficiency in food intake affecting the targeted population

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The state of being extremely poor within the targeted population

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: Lack of proper nutrition affecting the targeted population

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL WELFARE
entities.description: The overall health and sustainability of the natural environment

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the agricultural issues and value chain are analyzed

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The science or practice of farming and the associated sector

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL VALUE CHAIN
entities.description: The full range of activities required to bring an agricultural product from the field to the consumer

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: Practices used to protect soil and water resources from degradation

entities.name: MARKET CONNECTIVITY
entities.description: The ability of producers to access and sell their products in markets

entities.name: SOCIAL CONCERNS
entities.description: Issues related to the well-being and equity of people within the agricultural sector

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Factors in the environment that limit agricultural productivity

entities.name: ACCESS TO MARKETS
entities.description: The ability of farmers to reach buyers and sell their produce

entities.name: SOCIAL ENGINEERING
entities.description: The use of social science to influence social behavior and structures for development

entities.name: CASE STUDY APPROACH
entities.description: A research method involving an in-depth examination of a particular case to derive suggestions

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, used as a case study for development work
